sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 파커-하니핀은 2026 회계연도 3분기 매출 55억 달러와 조정 EPS 8.17달러로 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 매출은 전년 동기 대비 11% 증가한 55억 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대치를 경신했습니다.
조정 EPS는 18% 증가한 8.17달러로 사상 최고치를 기록했으며, 연간 매출 및 EPS 가이던스를 상향 조정했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 강력한 주문량과 사상 최대 수준의 수주 잔고를 바탕으로 연간 실적 전망치를 상향했습니다.
현금 창출 및 배분 역량을 강화하기 위해 분기 현금 배당금을 11% 인상하기로 결정했습니다.
분기 중 2억 7,500만 달러 규모의 자사주 매입을 실행했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 연초 대비 영업 현금 흐름은 26억 달러로 사상 최대치를 기록했습니다.
세그먼트 영업 이익률은 23.4%를 기록했으며, 조정 기준으로는 26.7%로 전년 대비 40bp 개선되었습니다.

watchItems.text: 상향 조정된 연간 가이던스(매출 성장 7%, 조정 EPS 31.20달러) 달성 여부와 수주 잔고의 실제 매출 전환 속도를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991q3fy26.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Parker Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results Record Sales of $5.5 Billion Drive Record Cash Flow and Adjusted EPS; Orders +9% CLEVELAND, April 30, 2026 -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today reported results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, that included the following highlights (compared with the prior year period): Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Highlights: • Sales increased 11% to a record $5.5 billion; organic sales increased 6.5% • Segment operating margin was 23.4%, an increase of 20 bps, or 26.7% adjusted, an increase of 40 bps • Net income was $0.9 billion, a decrease of 6% compared with the third quarter of fiscal 2025 which included  Normalized numeric aliases: $5.5 Billion = 55억 달러; $5.5 billion = 55억 달러; $0.9 billion = 9억 달러; $180 million = 1억 8,000만 달러; $1.0 billion = 10억 달러; $5.5 = 5.5달러; $0.9 = 0.9달러; $180 = 180달러; $7.06 = 7.06달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러.

decrease of 4% compared with the third quarter of fiscal 2025 which included a one-time discrete tax benefit of $1.37 • Adjusted EPS increased 18% to a record $8.17 • Year-to-date cash flow from operations was a record $2.6 billion, or 16.7% of sales • Repurchased $275 million of shares in the quarter • Company increases outlook for sales and EPS “Our global team delivered another quarter of record performance,” said Jenny Parmentier, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer. “In the third quarter, we reported record sales, adjusted segment operating income and margin, adjusted earnings per share and year-to-date operating cash flow. These results reflect the strength of our focused portfolio and our ability to use the tools in The Win Strategy™ to best serve the needs of our customers. With strong orders and record backlog, we are raising our outlook  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.6 billion = 26억 달러; $275 million = 2억 7,500만 달러; $1.37 = 1.37달러; $8.17 = 8.17달러; $2.6 = 2.6달러; $275 = 275달러.

owth for the year. Our focus on being great generators and deployers of cash is underscored by our recent decision to raise our quarterly cash dividend by 11%. This extends our track record of increasing our annual dividend payout, which now stands at 70 consecutive fiscal years.” This news release contains non-GAAP financial measures. Reconciliations of adjusted numbers and certain non-GAAP financial measures are included in the financial tables of this press release. Outlook Guidance for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2026 has been updated. The company expects: • Reported sales growth of 7%. • Organic sales growth of 5.5%; acquisitions of 1%, divestitures of (1%), and currency of 1.5%. • Segment operating margin of 23.9%, or 27.2% on an adjusted basis. • EPS of $27.10, or $31.20 on an adjusted basis. Segment Results Diversified Industrial Segment North America Businesses $ in mm FY26  Normalized numeric aliases: $27.10 = 27.10달러; $31.20 = 31.20달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
